name: shadow-tutor
description: Shadow Tutor — a post-session programming tutor that teaches you why the AI made each decision and drills you with forced-recall exercises.

plugins.name: shadow-tutor
plugins.description: After an AI-assisted coding session, get a short evidence-backed review of why each decision was made (including rejected options), plus graded forced-recall exercises. Fights the skill atrophy AI coding causes.
